stem: A swim team has 60 members, of whom 14 specialize in backstroke. If one team member is selected at random, what is the probability of selecting a member who specializes in backstroke?
rationale:
Choice D is correct. The probability is the number of backstroke specialists divided by the total: 14/60.

Choice A is incorrect; this is the probability of selecting one specific person. Choice B is incorrect; this is the probability of selecting a non-backstroke member. Choice C is incorrect; this would mean every member specializes in backstroke.
